attributes.description: This field holds the most common geographic data element within a country. For instance, USA State, and Canadian Province.

attributes.name: SubAdministrativeArea
attributes.description: This field holds the smallest geographic data element within a country. For instance, USA County.

matchGroups.label: Rule1:Exact(first, last, addressline1, city, state, identifier type, identifier);ExactOrNull(Middle, Suffix, Gender)
Rule2:Fuzzy(first, Last name);Exact (Addressline1, Zip5);ExactOrNull(Suffix, Zip4, Email id)
Rule3:Fuzzy(first, Last name);Exact (Identifier Id, Identifier Type)
